newsitems.title: 50,000 Wishlists!! 📈
newsitems.author: Pantaloon Anni
newsitems.contents: HARK! Our mob of beat-makers and disc jockeys grows ever larger as we've just hit another critical wishlist milestone just 24h before launch!50,000! 📣 That's a mind-blowing milestone to hit! And, what's more mind-blowing is the fact that almost 15,000 of those wishlists came in the last 24h. Thank you! You can start the countdown till the drop now because we're very nearly there!If you're looking for inspiration in the lead up to tomorrow and are yet to listen to Future Egg, check out this latest tune from OFFBEAT Radio below...See you tomorrow!Pantaloon & Whetstone Games

newsitems.title: 30,000 Wishlists 📣
newsitems.author: pantaloon.
newsitems.contents: Hello beat-makers and business buddies! Today we crossed another nice little wishlist milestone so thought we'd blow our trumpet a little bit. 30,000! 📣 What a beautiful number! 30,000 of you have now added the game to your wishlists, with nine days left until launch. But the crescendo is still building. The drop is going to be absolutely filthy.If you haven't listened to Future Egg yet, go and wrap your ears around the latest release from OFFBEAT Radio... Not long to go now...Pantaloon & Whetstone Games

newsitems.title: Brrrr! OFFBEAT calls you on July 22
newsitems.author: Pantaloon Anni
newsitems.contents: How do you do fellow jobbing composers!We thought you'd like to know that OFFBEAT is launching into Early Access on July 22. Yes, that's just little under three weeks from today!And to celebrate, we've released a brand-new track from OFFBEAT Radio called 'Future Egg'. Check it out below!The Early Access launch version will feature 7 different musical objects spread across two different chapters with more instruments, chapters, and features to be added throughout the Early Access period, culminating in the 1.0 launch in early 2027. Like in the demo, the early access launch will of course also feature the export function, allowing you to have WAV files of your tracks locally saved on your PC. And most importantly, you own the rights to everything you create in OFFBEAT. So, share it. Publish it. Do whatever you want!Ok that's it for now. See you in three weeks xJoin the Discord to share your music with us (and share creative tips and solutions with other players).

newsitems.title: TWENTY K! 🙈
newsitems.author: pantaloon.
newsitems.contents: Three days after our 10k milestone post, we've passed another! OFFBEAT has now been wishlisted twenty-thousand times, which for our little game about making tunes with kids toys and garden gnomes, is wildly exciting. Huge thanks to those of you that have spent time with the Demo (our median play time is nearly an hour, which is an equally exciting metric) - we've lost a non-trivial amount of dev-time to listening to all your tracks, watching your streams and generally seeing how you interact with the game. As a game that will be going into early access before too long, this dialogue between you and us is really key, and we're going to be continuing to pay close attention. Ok that's it for now. As you were x Join the Discord to share your music with us (and share creative tips and solutions with other players).

newsitems.title: Ten-Meowsand Wishlists!
newsitems.author: pantaloon.
newsitems.contents: The first big wishlist miilestone has been hit! Off the back of the new Next Fest Demo, OFFBEAT has now seen 10,000 wishlists, and not far off the same number of Demo activations. Music to our ears.Thanks to everybody that has checked out the game so far. If you've made music you're proud of, we'd love to hear it. We've created OFFBEAT Radio as a means of publishing and sharing the best music made by our players. As the game enters early access a little later this year, we'll be collating the best tracks and - with permission, of course - sharing these via our new record label. This could be you: Join the Discord to share your music with us (and share creative tips and solutions with other players). More soon x

newsitems.title: OFFBEAT is in Steam Next Fest
newsitems.author: Pantaloon Anni
newsitems.contents: You've found us in the ocean of thousands Steam Next Fest demos. Was it the monkey? Was it the sound of the synthwaves just waiting to be surfed? Whatever it is, here you are!OFFBEAT is part of Steam Next Fest this week. The first public demo gives you a taste of what the game will have to offer at Early Access, so setup your studio and pick up the phone - your uncle is calling. He's got a job for you!We can't wait to hear what you create!Check out our latest trailer for the game: Make music. Make money. Build the studio of your dreams. Then export your music to .wav and share it with us on the Discord!Enjoy the demo! We'll have more OFFBEAT news very soon!

newsitems.title: The OFFBEAT Demo is Here!
newsitems.author: pantaloon.
newsitems.contents: You've got all this pent up creative energy, I can feel it. It needs an outlet. It needs to be birthed into the world. Fear not. We got you. The first public Demo for OFFBEAT is here. And we can't wait to hear what you create. Check out our brand new trailer for the game: Make music. Make money. Build the studio of your dreams. Then export your music to .wav and share it with us - perhaps we'll then release it to the wider world (we set up Pantaloon Records to do exactly this). Enjoy the demo. There is much more to come...

newsitems.title: Make actual songs with singing garden gnomes in Offbeat, a jobbing composer sim that doubles as an audio production tool
newsitems.contents: I've never properly attempted a musical career, despite owning multiple guitars and an amp stack that takes up too much room. Maybe I'll finally get my big break thanks to Offbeat, a song composition sim that also outputs the tunes you make as WAV files, doing the job of basic audio production software. It's from the same publishers behind Boxroom, the game that turns your Steam library into a room full of posters. Read more

newsitems.title: Listen to the first single from OFFBEAT Radio
newsitems.author: pantaloon.
newsitems.contents: Hello! Ed from Whetstone Games here! We've lifted the lid! It's bloody off! We're excited to finally reveal OFFBEAT and give you a first look at the game.In putting together this announcement, we needed to create some music for the announce trailer. The game is literally about making music, so naturally I wanted to make the track using the game itself. So I fired up OFFBEAT, plugged the Tiger-01 into a delay pedal, and got to work.  Anyway, long story short, Pantaloon liked it so much that they decided to release it! And that meant that our announce trailer morphed into the music video for our first single.Here's Not Your Uncle's Ringtone. I'm very proud of it:Listen on your favourite streaming platform.It all demonstrates something integral to the game, though. OFFBEAT is a game that lets anybody create and export their own music, and then potentially have their work in the game published. We've created OFFBEAT Radio as a way to publish and distribute music created in the game, and celebrate the most notable work. So you, dear player, have every shot at a literal (albeit not major) record deal.We'll have more to share with you very soon, including a Demo where you'll be able to play an early version of the game firsthand. Watch this space.In the meantime, please pop the game onto your wishlist - this helps little old us immeasurably x
